name: Zendesk

auth.notes: OAuth, API token/basic for Support APIs; product-specific auth for Messaging/Sunshine.

rateLimits: Plan/endpoint-specific; headers expose remaining/reset; account-wide spike cap 100,000/min.
pagination: Cursor recommended; offset still supported but limited.
notes: Official API reference, auth, rate-limit, pagination, CLI, OpenAPI, SDK/client-library, and MCP announcement sources verified on 2026-05-28.
Zendesk MCP Server is announced for summer 2026; until public setup docs ship, treat MCP Server details as non-implementation-ready.
